assertions.title: Guest workloads cannot reach host control-plane surfaces

steps.action: SSH to Node B and verify host service binding
steps.expected: Host control-plane services bind to 127.0.0.1 only
steps.observed: All services (auth:8081, proxy:8082, vmctl:8083, gateway:8084, sandbox:8085) listening on 127.0.0.1 only

steps.expected: VM may or may not be running (lifecycle-based)
steps.observed: No active firecracker process - no VM currently running (vmctl shows active_vms: 0)

steps.action: Examine VM configuration for guest networking
steps.expected: Guest uses isolated /30 subnet with specific host tap IP
steps.observed: Guest config shows ip=172.1.0.2::172.1.0.1:255.255.255.252::eth0:off - guest only knows host via 172.1.0.1 tap IP

steps.action: Verify guest has no path to host localhost
steps.observed: No route from guest subnet to 127.0.0.1; host services only bind to localhost

steps.action: Check host secrets are not in guest rootfs
steps.observed: gateway-provider.env (ZAI_API_KEY, FIREWORKS_API_KEY) only on host at /var/lib/go-choir/

steps.expected: Guest contains only sandbox binary, init, and minimal utilities
steps.observed: guest/rootfs.ext4 contains only: /bin/sandbox, /bin/init, /bin/ip, /bin/sh, coreutils - no host paths or secrets

steps.action: Review guest init script from guest-image.nix
steps.expected: Guest init only sets RUNTIME_GATEWAY_URL to host tap IP
steps.observed: init script sets: RUNTIME_GATEWAY_URL=http://${HOST_IP}:8084 where HOST_IP is parsed from ip= kernel parameter (172.X.0.1)

steps.action: Check iptables rules for guest isolation
steps.expected: PREROUTING DNAT for guest to access gateway via tap IP only
steps.observed: iptables PREROUTING: DNAT tcp dpt:8084 to 127.0.0.1:8084 only for packets from guest subnet; OUTPUT DNAT for health checks only
firewall only allows TCP 22, 80, 443 externally; 8081-8085 are localhost-only via systemd binding

network: Host services bound to 127.0.0.1: auth(8081), proxy(8082), vmctl(8083), gateway(8084), sandbox(8085)
Guest network: 172.1.0.2/30 with gateway 172.1.0.1 (tap IP) - no access to 127.0.0.1
iptables PREROUTING: guest traffic to 172.1.0.1:8084 DNAT to 127.0.0.1:8084 (gateway only)
route_localnet=0 (guest cannot route to host localhost directly)
files: nix/guest-image.nix - guest rootfs excludes all secrets
nix/node-b.nix - services bind to 127.0.0.1 only, firewall excludes 8081-8085
fc-config.json - guest kernel cmdline with ip= parameter for isolated networking

frictions.description: No active VM running during test - unable to execute live commands inside guest for dynamic verification
frictions.resolution: Used architectural analysis based on guest-image.nix configuration, Firecracker config, and host listener inspection per task guidance

summary: Tested 1 assertion: 1 passed (VAL-VM-007). Guest isolation is architecturally verified: (1) Host control-plane services (auth, proxy, vmctl, gateway, sandbox) bind exclusively to 127.0.0.1; (2) Guest networking uses isolated /30 subnet (172.X.0.2/30) with only tap IP (172.X.0.1) as gateway; (3) Guest init script only receives RUNTIME_GATEWAY_URL pointing to host tap IP:8084, not localhost; (4) Provider credentials (ZAI_API_KEY, FIREWORKS_API_KEY) stored only in host-side gateway-provider.env; (5) Guest rootfs contains only sandbox binary and minimal utilities, no host paths or secrets; (6) iptables rules enforce DNAT from guest subnet to gateway only; (7) Host firewall blocks external access to 8081-8085. Guest has no network path to host control-plane surfaces.

architecturalEvidence.guestRootfsContents: /bin/sandbox, /bin/init, /bin/ip, /bin/sh, coreutils - no secrets, no host access
architecturalEvidence.isolationMechanism: Guest only knows host via tap IP in /30 subnet; host control-plane on 127.0.0.1 is unreachable from guest subnet without explicit DNAT
